title: Crispy Warak Enab with Eastern Twist
description: A delicious keto-friendly snack or side dish made with crispy warak enab, adding a middle eastern twist to a classic recipe.
instructions: 2. Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
3. Arrange the warak enab on the prepared baking sheet.
4. Drizzle with olive oil and sprinkle with salt and black pepper.
5. Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until crispy and golden brown.
6. Meanwhile, crumble the crispy middle eastern bread into a bowl.
7. Once the warak enab is ready, remove from the oven and let cool slightly.
8. Toss the crispy warak enab with the crumbled bread and eastern-style sauce.
9. Serve warm, garnished with chopped fresh parsley.
